rulings.Calendar Matter: To Compel Execution Of Acknoledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complt; Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Case Title: MACHUE VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC*

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Withdraw As Attorney Of Record; Declaration; P/A
rulings.Rulings: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO USE MANDATORY FORM. SEE CRC 376.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment; Decl Of David H. Williams In Support
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: GRANT UNDER CCP 473(D). DEFENDANTS' DECLARATIONS DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANT (SONG) WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED. THEREFORE, THE DEFAULT AND ANY ENSUING JUDGMENT ARE VOID. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS TIMELY PER ROGERS V. SILVERMAN, (1989) 216 CAL.APP.3D 1114; GIBBLE V. CAR-LENE RESEARCH, INC., (1998) 67 CAL.APP.4TH 295, 301, FN. 3. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: PHOENIX AMERICAN INC VS AMERICAN ARB
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Or Strike Costs Requested By Pltf Phoenix American Incorporated; Memo P/A; Declaration;
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO TAX OR STRIKE COSTS DENIED. (GK(EX)

rulings.Case Title: SOMMERCAMP VS UNUM LIFE INSURANCE CO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice
rulings.Rulings: GRANT BITA ABDOLLAHI MOTION TO APPEAR PRO HAC VICE.

rulings.Case Title: GORDON VS THE CALIF DEPT OF CORRECTIONS
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE EXCUSABLE REASON FOR DELAY IN DISCOVERY OF ADMINSTRATIVE ERRORS. NO EXPLANATION FOR DELAY IN REQUESTING FILE. EQUITABLE TOLLING DOES NOT APPLY - FEDERAL ACTION IS OF A DIFFERENT CHARACTER SEE PARAGRAPH 36.3. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: FIRST CHURCH VS KNOCKASH HILL ASSOC
rulings.Rulings: OVERRULED, SEE ARAGON-HAAS V. FAMILY SECURITY INS. SERVICES, INC., (1991) 231 CAL.APP.3D 232, 239. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA PASSMAN VS. KELLY SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION, 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION TRESPASS TO CHATTELS, 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE RE BAILMENT. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MORT GARSON VS. LAWRENCE WILLIAM FASANO JR et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1)FRAUD 2)CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD 3)SLANDER OF TITLE 4)ABUSE OF PROCESS WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ARBITRATION AND CONFIRMING JUDGMENT BARS CLAIMS ADVANCED. (AD(EX)

rulings.Case Title: EOI TAKAGI VS. BRET CLEMONS et al
ST FRANCIS PLACE VS. KENNETH W MAYO
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PROVIDED PLAINTIFF CAN ALLEGE HE SERVED DECEMBER 14, 2001 LETTER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE 1946. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: SAMUEL A MORGAN SR VS. DAVID BRAZIL
CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. KENNETH ADAMS et al
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.
